creator: vd@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Mon, Sep 18, 2006 at 04:14:13AM +0200, Timur I. Bakeyev wrote:
[...]
> 
> I'm glad, that we found a consensus on that topic. It's a pity that you
> made all that tremendous work of finding all Samba dependencies with no
> results though... Hopefully, that won't leave bitter feeling with you.
> 
Well it was just a matter of running

/usr/ports/Tools/scripts/rmport -d net/samba3

-- 
Vasil Dimov
gro.DSBeerF@dv

Testing can show the presence of bugs, but not their absence.
